summary: Modal makes a legitimate engineering point -- requests matter more than tokens for self-hosted inference planning -- but buries the lede: they sell the compute you'd need to act on this advice. The 'considered harmful' framing is borrowed gravitas for what's essentially a sales blog post with hypothetical examples instead of benchmarks.
career_angle: LLM developments affect every developer. Understand the capabilities and limitations - knowing what AI can't do is as valuable as knowing what it can.
